message:
test(fcp-host): expand supervisor.rs coverage + fix backoff test

supervisor.rs: 113 → 183 (+70 tests) — ProcessExit variants, RestartPolicy
edge cases, ExponentialBackoff boundaries, ShutdownCoordinator states,
HealthCheckScheduler timing, ResourceLimits/ResourceUsage/ResourceViolation,
ConnectionTracker guards.

Fix backoff_zero_max test: initial delay returned before max clamping
(attempt 0 short-circuits in current_delay implementation).

fcp-host total: 2644 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
